ignore.reason: Occasionally this narrator starts sentences with lowercase letters. Have to assume it's intentional given the dialect style.
This rendering of the initialism is likely intentional given the writing style of the narrator.
This is used in place of the word "oh". Probably intentional given the style of the book.
Lower-case in the scans. Likely intentional given dialect style.
